creator: keramida@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, 15 Jun 2009 10:26:26 +0200, Remko Lodder <remko@elvandar.org> wrote:
>>> I have prepared a new 24 bit version of the FreeBSD Project
>>> favicon. It is available at:
>>>
>>> http://noc.ntua.gr/~christia/freebsd-favicon-24bit.ico
>>
>> Any objections from other freebsd-www people?
>>
>> The new icon does look much better, so if there is no serious reason
>> why we can't replace it, I'd like to commit the icon submitted by
>> Panagiotis.
>
> please do :)

Since there have been no objections for a couple of weeks, I committed
the new icon in revision 1.3.  Thanks :)
